preview.title: Replacement turbo bracket (rev 2)
preview.snippet: Stronger gusset on inboard leg; reduces resonance at 6800 rpm. STEP + DXF attached.

preview.title: Drill jig for spindle alignment
preview.snippet: Two-piece jig with replaceable hardened bushings. Tolerances called out for ±0.05 mm.

preview.title: Custom M6 fastener (left-thread)
preview.snippet: Needed for reverse-loaded compressor housing. Drawing-ready; no off-the-shelf SKU exists.
